explanations.3: The !important flag forces this background color to apply even if other CSS rules try to override it, which we need here to ensure consistency.
explanations.30: The left position of 17px centers the vertical line with a 34px icon (half of 34 is 17), since the icon starts at position 0.
explanations.52: We're matching the icon's background color to the container's background so the vertical line appears to pass behind the icon instead of showing through it.
explanations.65: The 45px padding gives enough room for the 34px icon plus an 11px gap, pushing the text content to the right of the icon.
